title: M5 breaks with huge SQL query.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE customers (id UInt32, name String NOT NULL, email String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO customers (name, email) VALUES ('John Doe', 'john.doe@example.com');
CREATE TABLE orders (id UInt32, customer_id UInt32, total_amount Decimal(10, 2) NOT NULL, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT c.name, o.total_amount FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.total_amount > 50.00;
key_bug_features: Huge SQL query causes M5 to break
